title: Command Generation Consumer Boundary
goal: Implement #434 by making the Agentic Workspace side of command generation an explicit, narrow consumer integration over the isolated command-generation package.
non_goals: Do not move workspace command definitions out of this repo.
Do not move runtime primitives into the generator.
Do not publish the generator externally.
Do not add a first-contact product surface.

intent.outcome: Agentic Workspace owns command facts and runtime primitives while consuming generic rendering/loading through one repo integration layer.
intent.constraints: Generic package code must not import Agentic Workspace runtime internals.
intent.latitude: Add or tighten wrapper code, make/check routing, and contributor docs.
intent.escalation: Escalate if the consumer layer starts duplicating generic generation behavior.

execution.next_step: Archive the completed execplan, commit, push, close #434, then continue #435.
execution.proof: proof selector plus generated package, contract tooling, ruff, planning, and focused tests.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: #430 isolate generic command-generation machinery for future extraction

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: A maintainer can see and test which code is repo-specific integration versus generic generation.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: The generic renderer still carried a workspace-specific runtime fallback; moved that value into workspace-owned IR so the package renders host-provided runtime binding data.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Make the package streamlined, lightweight, frictionless, cheap, modular, and small while preserving leverage.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Dogfood package surfaces, keep repo/tool/language assumptions out of the shipped package, commit/push milestone, close issue only after proof.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact wrapper module location and contributor-doc wording.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: A change would make the generic package depend on Agentic Workspace runtime internals.

active_milestone.scope: repo consumer wrapper and ownership guidance

immediate_next_action: Archive completed plan and close #434 after commit/push.

context_budget.live working set: scripts/generate/workspace_command_generation.py plus generator/check wrappers, command-package IR/schema, generated package outputs, and focused tests.
context_budget.recoverable later: Archived execplans for #431-#433 and issue bodies for #430-#435.
context_budget.externalize before shift: Archive this plan with proof summary and close #434 before starting #435.
context_budget.pre-work memory pull: not needed; issue and planning surfaces were sufficient
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Continue with #435 lift-out criteria after #434 evidence refresh.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Validation failure, generated output drift, or package importing Agentic Workspace runtime internals.

validation_commands: uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed scripts/generate/workspace_command_generation.py scripts/generate/generate_command_packages.py scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py packages/command-generation/src/agentic_command_generation/generator.py packages/command-generation/schemas/command_package_ir.schema.json src/agentic_workspace/contracts/command_package_ir.json src/agentic_workspace/contracts/schemas/command_package_ir.schema.json generated/typescript/workspace-cli/src/cli.mjs generated/typescript/workspace-cli/package.json generated/typescript/planning-cli/package.json generated/typescript/memory-cli/package.json src/agentic_workspace/generated_cli_package/__init__.py packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/generated_cli_package/__init__.py packages/memory/src/repo_memory_bootstrap/generated_cli_package/__init__.py docs/contributor-playbook.md tests/test_contract_tooling.py .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/command-generation-consumer-boundary.plan.json --format json
uv run ruff check src tests
uv run agentic-workspace defaults --section root_cli_authority --format json
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section workflow_obligations --format json
uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section closeout_trust --format json
completion_criteria: Agentic Workspace path/config decisions live in one integration wrapper.
Generate/check scripts consume the wrapper instead of duplicating path wiring.
Contributor docs state the ownership split.
Generic command-generation package remains free of Agentic Workspace imports.
Existing generated outputs and checks remain reproducible.

execution_run.handoff source: GitHub issue #434 plus agentic-workspace summary, agentic-workspace preflight, agentic-workspace report, and agentic-workspace proof
execution_run.what happened: Added scripts/generate/workspace_command_generation.py as the Agentic Workspace consumer wrapper, routed generate/check scripts through it, documented the ownership split, moved the TypeScript runtime fallback into workspace-owned command-package IR, regenerated derived outputs, and added boundary tests so the generic package does not know Agentic Workspace runtime internals.
execution_run.scope touched: command-generation package renderer, workspace command-package IR/schema, generated package outputs, repo integration scripts, contributor playbook, focused tests, planning state
execution_run.changed surfaces: workspace consumer integration wrapper, workspace-owned IR, generated command package projections, maintainer playbook, active execplan
execution_run.validations run: agentic-workspace proof selected workspace_cli, generated_command_packages, cli_authority, maintainer_surfaces, and planning_surfaces; ran generated package freshness/static/conformance/Docker/Docker-conformance, tests/test_contract_tooling.py, tests/test_workspace_cli.py, ruff, contract-tooling surfaces, root_cli_authority defaults, planning doctor/check, maintainer-surfaces, agentic-workspace preflight, agentic-workspace summary, agentic-workspace report workflow_obligations, agentic-workspace report closeout_trust, and agentic-workspace reconcile.
execution_run.result for continuation: #434 is complete; #435 remains for lift-out criteria.
execution_run.next step: Archive this plan, commit, push, close #434, refresh external evidence, then promote #435.

finished_run_review.config compliance: used compact startup, summary, proof, report, doctor, and reconcile surfaces

proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --conformance --require-node; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --docker --require-docker; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --docker-conformance --require-docker; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run pytest tests/test_contract_tooling.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py; uv run agentic-workspace defaults --section root_cli_authority --format json; make maintainer-surfaces; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Make Agentic Workspace integration with the internal command-generation package explicit and minimal.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: Workspace path/config concerns now live in scripts/generate/workspace_command_generation.py, generate/check scripts consume that wrapper, workspace runtime fallback is declared in workspace-owned IR, and tests prevent Agentic Workspace imports from the generic package.

closure_check.why this decision is honest: The bounded slice is complete and remaining intent is routed to a checked-in continuation owner.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: Prepared closeout records intent satisfaction, closure decision, proof evidence, and distillation buckets.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Reopen when .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml roadmap activates a fresh bounded slice.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Explicit Agentic Workspace consumer layer over isolated command generation.
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (Memory/Docs/Config): contributor playbook updated; no Memory update needed

signals found: Generic renderer had a hard-coded Agentic Workspace runtime fallback.
signals fixed: Moved the fallback into workspace-owned command-package IR and added a no-Agentic-Workspace-import test for the generic package.

discard.summary: No durable local execution detail needs preservation beyond this archived proof.

memory.summary: contributor playbook updated; no Memory update needed

config_check.summary: contributor playbook updated; no Memory update needed
